generated_from: Valve dota2.com datafeed KB + curated itemization layer

illusions.label: Illusions
illusions.reason: AoE damage instantly deletes illusions; single-target items are wasted on them.

core.name: Gleipnir
core.why: AoE root + chain lightning reveals the real hero

support.name: Solar Crest
support.why: Doesn't help vs illusions directly — armor the target instead

summons.label: Summons
summons.reason: AoE damage and damage block neutralize summon-based pushing.

core.name: Crimson Guard
core.why: Damage block negates many small hits

support.name: Mekansm
support.why: AoE armor/heal vs summon chip damage

invisibility.label: Invisibility
invisibility.reason: Detection wins the game vs invisible heroes; never skip it.

core.name: Monkey King Bar
core.why: You still need to hit them when revealed

support.name: Gem of True Sight
support.why: Carry it once you have detection backup

evasion.label: Evasion / miss chance
evasion.reason: True strike or spell damage — don't right-click into evasion.

core.name: Bloodthorn
core.why: Silenced targets take guaranteed crits and can't be missed

support.name: Rod of Atos
support.why: Lock them down so spells do the killing

silence.label: Silences
silence.reason: Buy dispels and spell immunity so key spells still get cast.

hard_disable.label: Hard disables (stun/hex/fear)
hard_disable.reason: Spell immunity, spell block, and save items counter lockdown combos.

support.name: Aeon Disk
support.why: Survive the combo after the stun

root.label: Roots
root.reason: Dispels remove roots; Force Staff still works while rooted.

support.name: Force Staff
support.why: Roots don't stop Force Staff — save rooted allies

big_magic.label: Heavy magic damage
big_magic.reason: Stack magic resistance and immunity before their burst timing hits.

core.name: Black King Bar
core.why: The classic answer to magic burst

core.name: Eternal Shroud
core.why: Spell lifesteal + resistance for tanky cores

heal_regen.label: Healing / regen / lifesteal
heal_regen.reason: Healing reduction turns sustain heroes into normal heroes.

mobility.label: High mobility
mobility.reason: Roots, silences, and instant disables stop hit-and-run heroes.

core.name: Rod of Atos
core.why: Cheap root to lock them down

physical_dps.label: Physical damage carry
physical_dps.reason: Armor, evasion, disarm, and ghost form blunt right-click damage.

core.name: Assault Cuirass
core.why: Armor for you, minus armor for them

support.name: Solar Crest
support.why: Armor an ally or shred the carry

armor_reduction.label: Armor reduction
armor_reduction.reason: Stack armor and barriers to offset the reduction.

mana_drain.label: Mana burn / drain
mana_drain.reason: Keep mana topped up and block the big targeted payoff spell.

break_worthy.label: Passive-reliant (Break target)
break_worthy.reason: Break shuts off passive-dependent heroes almost entirely.

support.name: Spirit Vessel
support.why: If the passive is regen-based, Vessel helps too

tanky.label: Very tanky
tanky.reason: Percentage damage, armor reduction, and heal cut beat raw HP.

core.name: Diffusal Blade
core.why: Mana burn + slow scales vs big HP pools

core.name: Eye of Skadi
core.why: Slow + stat shred on fat targets

slows.label: Slows
slows.reason: Status resistance and dispels shrug off kiting.

spell_reflect_dodge.label: Spell block / echo
spell_reflect_dodge.reason: Pop spell block with a cheap spell first, or use items that ignore it.

core.name: Nullifier
core.why: Mutes protective items; projectile isn't blocked by Linken's

reincarnation.label: Reincarnation
reincarnation.reason: Drain mana so Reincarnation can't trigger, or burst him twice fast.

support.name: Spirit Vessel
support.why: Cut his lifesteal sustain between deaths
